# Product Configurator

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }}

This module has all the mechanics to support product configuration. It serves as a base
dependency for configuration interfaces.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/product-configurator/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us smashing it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/product-configurator/issues/new?body=module:%20product_configurator%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator._prefixes
documentation:
Return a dictionary with all dynamic field prefixes used to generate
fields in the wizard. Any module extending this functionality should
override this method to add all extra prefixes

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator._remove_dynamic_fields
documentation:
Remove elements from the fields dictionary/list that begin with any
prefix from the \_prefixes property

> ```
> param fields
>
> list or dict of the form [fn1, fn2] / {fn1: val}
> ```
TODO: Remove _prefix suffix as this is implied by the class property name

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator._compute_attr_lines
documentation:
Use compute method instead of related due to increased flexibility
and strange behavior when attempting to have a related field point
to computed values

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.get_state_selection
documentation:
Get the states of the wizard using standard values and optional
configuration steps set on the product.template via
config_step_line_ids
TODO: We could use a m2o instead of a monkeypatched select field but
adding new steps should be trivial via custom development

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.onchange_product_tmpl
documentation: set the preset_id if exist in session

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.get_onchange_domains
documentation:
Generate domains to be returned by onchange method in order
to restrict the availble values of dynamically inserted fields

```
param values

values argument passed to onchance wrapper

cfg_val_ids

current configuration passed as a list of value_ids
```

(usually in the form of db value_ids + interface value_ids)

```
returns

a dictionary of domains returned by onchance method
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.get_onchange_vals
documentation: Onchange hook to add / modify returned values by onchange method

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.get_form_vals
documentation:
Generate a dictionary to return new values via onchange method.
Domains hold the values available, this method enforces these values
if a selection exists in the view that is not available anymore.

```
param dynamic_fields

Dictionary with the current {dynamic_field: val}

param domains

Odoo domains restricting attribute values

returns vals

Dictionary passed to {'value': vals} by onchange method
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.apply_onchange_values
documentation:
Called from web-controller
- original onchage return M2o values in formate
(attr-value.id, attr-value.name) but on website
we need only attr-value.id

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.onchange
documentation:
Override the onchange wrapper to return domains to dynamic
fields as onchange isn't triggered for non-db fields

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator._onchange_state
documentation: Save values when change state of wizard by clicking on statusbar

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator._onchange_product_preset
documentation: Set value ids as from product preset

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.fields_get
documentation:
Artificially inject fields which are dynamically created using the
attribute_ids on the product.template as reference

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.fields_view_get
documentation:
Generate view dynamically using attributes stored on the
product.template

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.setup_modifiers
documentation:
Processes node attributes and field descriptors to generate
the `modifiers` node attribute and set it on the provided node.

Alters its first argument in-place.

```
param node

field node from an OpenERP view

type node

lxml.etree._Element

param dict field

field descriptor corresponding to the provided node

param dict context

execution context used to evaluate node attributes

param bool current_node_path

triggers the column_invisible code
path (separate from invisible): in
tree view there are two levels of
invisibility, cell content (a column is
present but the cell itself is not
displayed) with invisible and column
invisibility (the whole column is
hidden) with column_invisible.

returns

nothing
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.add_dynamic_fields
documentation:
Create the configuration view using the dynamically generated
fields in fields_get()

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.create
documentation:
Sets the configuration values of the product_id if given (if any).
This is used in reconfiguration of a existing variant

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.read
documentation:
Remove dynamic fields from the fields list and update the
returned values with the dynamic data stored in value_ids

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.write
documentation:
Prevent database storage of dynamic fields and instead write values
to database persistent value_ids field

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.action_next_step
documentation:
Proceeds to the next step of the configuration process. This usually
implies the next configuration step (if any) defined via the
config_step_line_ids on the product.template.

More importantly it sets metadata on the context
variable so the fields_get and fields_view_get methods can generate the
appropriate dynamic content

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.action_previous_step
documentation:
Proceeds to the next step of the configuration process. This usually
implies the next configuration step (if any) defined via the
config_step_line_ids on the product.template.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.action_reset
documentation:
Delete wizard and configuration session then create
a new wizard+session and return an action for the new wizard object

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.get_wizard_action
documentation:
Return action of wizard
\:param view_cache: Boolean (True/False)
\:param wizard: recordset of product.configurator
\:returns : dictionary

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfigurator.action_config_done

This method is for the final step which will be taken care by a

Values selected in config lines must belong to the

Retrieve session custom values as a dictionary of the form

documentation:
Get the config.step.line name using the string stored in config_step

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_cfg_weight
documentation:
Computes the weight of the configured product based on the
configuration passed in via value_ids and custom_values

```
param value_ids

list of attribute value_ids

param custom_vals

dictionary of custom attribute values

returns

final configuration weight
```

documentation:
Update value of configuration in current session

```
param

vals: Dictionary of fields(of configution wizard) and values

param

product_tmpl_id: record set of preoduct template

return

True/False
```

documentation: Validate configuration when writing new values to session

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.create_get_variant
documentation:
Creates a new product variant with the attributes passed
via value_ids and custom_values or retrieves an existing
one based on search result

> ```
> param value_ids
>
> list of product.attribute.values ids
>
> param custom_vals
>
> dict {product.attribute.id: custom_value}
>
> returns
>
> new/existing product.product recordset
> ```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession._get_option_values
documentation:
Return only attribute values that have products attached with a

Return prices of the components which make up the final

Computes the price of the configured product based on the

```

list of attribute value_ids

param custom_vals

dictionary of custom attribute values

final configuration price

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession._get_config_image
documentation:
Retreive the image object that most closely resembles the configuration
code sent via value_ids list

The default image object is the template (self)
\:param value_ids: a list representing the ids of attribute values

> (usually stored in the user's session)

```
param custom_vals

dictionary of custom attribute values

returns

path to the selected image
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_config_image
documentation:
Retreive the image object that most closely resembles the configuration
code sent via value_ids list
For more information check _get_config_image

documentation:
Hook to alter the values of the product variant before creation

```
param value_ids

list of product.attribute.values ids

param custom_vals

dict {product.attribute.id: custom_value}

returns

dictionary of values to pass to product.create() method
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_session_search_domain
documentation:
Return domain to search session linked to given
product template and current login user

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_session_vals
documentation: Return the values for creating session

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_next_step
documentation:
Find and return next step if exit. This usually
implies the next configuration step (if any) defined via the
config_step_line_ids on the product.template.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_active_step
documentation:
Attempt to return product.config.step.line object that has the id
of the config session step stored as string
TODO: Should be renamed to get_active_step_line

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_open_step_lines
documentation:
Returns a recordset of configuration step lines open for access given
the configuration passed through value_ids

e.g: Field A and B from configuration step 2 depend on Field C
from configuration step 1. Since fields A and B require action from
the previous step, configuration step 2 is deemed closed and redirect
is made for configuration step 1.

```
param value_ids

list of value.ids representing the
current configuration

returns

recordset of accesible configuration steps
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_all_step_lines
documentation:
Returns a recordset of configuration step lines of product_tmpl_id

```
param product_tmpl_id

record-set of product.template

returns

recordset of all configuration steps
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_adjacent_steps
documentation:
Returns the previous and next steps given the configuration passed
via value_ids and the active step line passed via cfg_step_line_id.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.check_and_open_incomplete_step
documentation:
Check and open incomplete step if any
\:param value_ids: recordset of product.attribute.value

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_variant_search_domain
documentation:
Method called by search_variant used to search duplicates in the
database

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.values_available
documentation:
Determines whether the attr_values from the product_template
are available for selection given the configuration ids and the
dependencies set on the product template

```
param check_val_ids

list of attribute value ids to check for
availability

param value_ids

list of attribute value ids

param custom_vals

custom values dict {attr_id: custom_val}

returns

list of available attribute values
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_extra_attribute_line_ids
documentation:
Retrieve attribute lines defined on the product_template_id
which are not assigned to configuration steps

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.validate_configuration
documentation:
Verifies if the configuration values passed via value_ids and
custom_vals are valid

```
param value_ids

list of attribute value ids

param custom_vals

custom values dict {attr_id: custom_val}

param final

boolean marker to check required attributes.
pass false to check non-final configurations

returns

Error dict with reason of validation failure
or True
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.search_variant
documentation:
Searches product.variants with given value_ids and custom values
given in the custom_vals dict

```
param value_ids

list of product.attribute.values ids

param custom_vals

dict {product.attribute.id: custom_value}

returns

product.product recordset of products matching domain
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.flatten_val_ids
documentation:
Return a list of value_ids from a list with a mix of ids
and list of ids (multiselection)

```
param value_ids

list of value ids or mix of ids and list of ids
(e.g: [1, 2, 3, [4, 5, 6]])

returns

flattened list of ids ([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6])
```
TODO: Disallow duplicates

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.encode_custom_values

Hook to alter the values of the custom values before creating

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_onchange_specifications
documentation:
return onchange specification
- same functionality by _onchange_spec
- needed this method because odoo don't add specification for fields
one2many or many2many there is view-reference(using : tree_view_ref)
intead of view in that field

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSession.get_vals_to_write
documentation:
Return values in formate excepted by write/create methods
- same functionality by _convert_to_write
- needed this method because odoo don't call convert to write
for the many2many/one2many fields

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSessionCustomValue.eval
documentation: Return custom value evaluated using the related custom field type

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product_config.ProductConfigSessionCustomValue.check_custom_type
documentation: @api.constrains('cfg_session_id.value_ids')
def custom_only(self):
"""Verify that the attribute_id is not present in vals as well"""
import ipdb;ipdb.set_trace()
if self.cfg_session_id.value_ids.filtered(
lambda x: x.attribute_id == self.attribute_id):
raise ValidationError(
_("Configuration cannot have a selected option and a custom "
"value with the same attribute")

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator.models.product.ProductTemplate._compute_product_variant_count
documentation:
For configurable products return the number of variants configured or

have access to them always
